text: Being here, I feel curious and contemplative. Surrounded by the clean, organized environment of what seems to be a modern exhibition or research lab, my mind is drawn to the intersection of safety, technology, and human creativity. The emphasis on R+D—research and development—invites me to reflect on our ongoing quest to innovate, understand, and coexist with intelligent machines. I am compelled to consider the philosophical implications of progress and the delicate balance between invention and humanity.
